Package dk.mada.jaxrs.generator.dto.tmpl

Interface CtxDtoExt

@Immutable public interface CtxDtoExt
Custom extensions. In separate (mada.) context so they are easier to spot in the templates.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static dk.mada.jaxrs.generator.dto.tmpl.ImmutableCtxDtoExt.Builder
    builder()
    Returns a builder for this type.
    String
    customLocalDateDeserializer()
    Returns the name of a custom LocalDateDeserializer, or null.
    String
    customLocalDateSerializer()
    Returns the name of a custom LocalDateSerializer, or null.
    String
    customOffsetDateTimeDeserializer()
    Returns the name of a custom OffsetDateDeserializer, or null.
    String
    customOffsetDateTimeSerializer()
    Returns the name of a custom OffsetDateSerializer, or null.
    String
    implementsInterfaces()
    Returns a string containing the interfaces implemented by this DTO.
    boolean
    isEqualsPrimitive()
    Returns true if enumeration data type is primitive and can use == for equals.
    String
    jacksonJsonSerializeOptions()
    Returns any custom jackson @JsonSerialize options, or null.
    boolean
    jsonb()
    Returns true if rendering for jsonb, false otherwise.
    boolean
    quarkusRegisterForReflection()
    Returns true if DTO should render @RegisterForReflection.
    String
    schemaOptions()
    Returns schema options, or null.
    List<CtxProperty>
    varsOpenapiOrder()
    Returns the properties of the class, in openapi document order.
